ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_title" TEXT /* Title of the show */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the show */,
  "premiere_date" TEXT /* Date of the show's premiere */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the show (e.g., Running, Ended) */,
  "show_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the show */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* The country where the show is produced */,
  "producer" TEXT /* The name of the producer or production company */,
  "network" TEXT /* The network or streaming platform where the show primarily airs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show to which this season belongs */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number */,
  "air_year" INTEGER /* Year the season aired */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the season */,
  "total_episodes" INTEGER /* The total number of episodes in the season */,
  "season_start_date" TEXT /* The date the season started airing */,
  "season_end_date" TEXT /* The date the season ended airing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season to which this episode belongs */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "directed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the episode */,
  "written_by" INTEGER /* ID of the writer(s) of the episode */,
  "original_air_date" TEXT /* Date the episode originally aired */,
  "production_code" TEXT /* Production code for the episode */,
  "us_viewers" REAL /* U.S. viewers in millions */,
  "episode_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the episode */,
  "episode_runtime" INTEGER /* The duration of the episode in minutes */,
  "episode_budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the episode */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* The revenue generated from the episode */,
  "rating" REAL /* The rating of the episode (e.g., 7.5 out of 10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_written_by FOREIGN KEY ("written_by") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_directed_by FOREIGN KEY ("directed_by") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the director */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the writer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the writer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewership metric record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date of the viewership data recorded */,
  "us_viewers" REAL /* U.S. viewers in millions */,
  "international_viewers" REAL /* International viewers in millions */,
  "age_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic breakdown by age group */,
  "gender_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic breakdown by gender */,
  "viewing_device" TEXT /* The type of device used for viewing (e.g., TV, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_metrics_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production document */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode related to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Script, Production Note) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document (e.g., v1.0, v2.0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_documents_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the viewing platform (e.g., Hulu, Netflix) */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the platform */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the platform is primarily available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_viewership" (
  "platform_viewership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform viewership record */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "us_viewers" REAL /* U.S. viewers in millions */,
  "international_viewers" REAL /* International viewers in millions */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* The day of the week the episode was viewed */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* The time of day the episode was viewed */,
  "viewing_duration" REAL /* The average duration viewers spent watching the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_viewership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_viewership_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES viewing_platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_viewership_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* ID of the role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Writer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
